creator: spamro@gmail.com
text:
Hello.

Exact same problem occur if /usr/obj is NFS mounted share.
*make buildword* fails with

*"In file included from
/usr/src/gnu/lib/libgcc/../../../contrib/gcc/unwind-dw2.c:40:
/usr/src/gnu/lib/libgcc/../../../contrib/gcc/unwind-pe.h: In function
'unsigned int size_of_encoded_value(unsigned char)':
/usr/src/gnu/lib/libgcc/../../../contrib/gcc/unwind-pe.h:90: error: 'abort'
is not a member of 'std'"*

If /usr/obj isn't empty or -DNO_CLEAN used *make buildword* fail with
another output.

Thanks.
